title: LN2 2QX, Star Energy Weald Basin Limited: permit surrender issued - EPR/PP3439XP/S007
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter, decision document and site condition report evaluation template for:   Operator name: Star Energy Weald Basin Limited Installation name: Holybourne Rail Terminal Permit number: EPR/PP3439XP/S007  "
